situational_context: Running comeback day 69 (14 runs since May 3, 2026). Distances reached 7.5 km (Run #12, Jun 21) with stable tissue tolerance. ACWR corrected from 1.35 (Jun 14) to 1.10 — safe zone restored after the Jun mid-month spike resolved via spacing. Paris heatwave (Météo-France RED alert, 38-39°C, Jul 8-12) forced 6+ days without running; last run was Run #14 on Jul 5 (6.0 km, load 30). Short trip to Saint-Malo Jul 12-13 (coastal ~20°C, GREEN zone) before returning to Paris. Post-heatwave modifier active in Paris through ~Jul 22 — all outdoor sessions in shifted heat bands. Recovery markers show expected heat strain: HRV overnight 29 ms (lowest in 7d), body battery 28 — should resolve as conditions cool. VO2max running improved to 41.5 (from 40.6 at last state Jun 14). Weight 103.67 kg (single Jun 21 reading; pesée due Jul 12). No new labs since Dec 2025; Vitamin D retest overdue (was 27 ng/mL). E-bike commuting (38 km round-trip) remains primary modality on work days.

recommendations.text: Resume running on Jul 15 with 5-6 km Z2 at Bois de Vincennes. 10 days since last run — start at demonstrated tolerance floor (5-6 km, not 7+). Post-heatwave yellow zone at 11:30: pre-hydrate 500 mL, shade route, ease pace 10-20 s/km. If feels-like >23°C at session time, shorten to 4 km or substitute indoor treadmill.
recommendations.measurable: Run #15 completed at 5-6 km with avg HR ≤ 145 bpm and no tissue pain >24h post-run

recommendations.text: Monitor HRV recovery from heatwave stress. Overnight HRV dropped to 29 ms (from 36 the night before). Body battery at 28 (lowest in 7d). These should normalize within 2-3 days. If HRV weekly avg drops below 32 or RHR rises >55 bpm for 3+ consecutive days, skip Run #15 and extend rest.
recommendations.measurable: HRV weekly avg ≥ 35 by Jul 14; body battery max ≥ 40 at least 3 of next 5 days

recommendations.text: Vitamin D retest overdue (was due early Jul). Dec 2025 level was 27 ng/mL (insufficient, target ≥40). Supplementation active 7+ months — expect meaningful improvement. Schedule blood panel before end of July.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if HRV overnight stays below 30 for 2+ consecutive nights
markers_to_watch.reason: Today's 29 ms is likely a heat artifact; consecutive lows would signal deeper fatigue

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if body battery max stays below 35 for 3+ consecutive days
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently at 28; should recover as heat stress abates and conditions cool

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized joint/tendon pain lasting >24h after Run #15
markers_to_watch.reason: 10-day gap before next run; tissue tolerance needs re-confirmation at 103 kg
